name: session-aware-equity-collateral
description: Session-aware equity collateral oracle — continuous 24/7 mark price for tokenized equities with EMA off-hours, transition smoothing, and variance guard. Built on SEDA.

scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx seda-sdk oracle-program upload ./target/wasm32-wasip1/release-wasm/session-aware-equity-collateral.wasm
